title: S&P Hits Records Amid Geopolitical Shift
html:
S&P Hits Records Amid Geopolitical Shift

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: Market sentiment around geopolitical tensions has stabilized for now. While underlying issues remain unresolved, attention is expected to gradually shift toward China trade negotiations, with media likely focusing on tariff deal developments. Military operations continue in Lebanon though market attention has diminished.

+ SPX tracker: The S&P 500 is trading at record levels.
Levels: Resistance at 7003, 7041, 7223, and 7354. Support at 6846, 6797, 6711, and 6650.
- Short term lines: ES_F | SPX | ASML (earnings)

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 131313)

Nic

+ Key Talking Point:
— TOMORROW —
★★ Industrial Production
★★ Initial Jobless Claims
— Tue Apr 21 —
★★★ Advance Retail Sales

+ Earnings TABLE
Wed Apr 15: ASML BAC MS PGR PNC MTB FHN | JBHT (KMI)
Thu Apr 16: TSM PEP ABT SCHW PLD BK USB MRSH TRV CFG KEY WIT | NFLX AA
Fri Apr 17: TFC FITB ERIC STT RF ALLY | (HDB IBN)

NOTE ID: 202604150457 | 0415
